question: Develop a C++ program that takes an integer year as input from the user and determines if it is a leap year. Print an appropriate message. (A leap year is divisible by 4, but not by 100 unless it is also divisible by 400).

test_cases.expected: Enter a year: 2000 is a leap year.
Enter a year: 1900 is not a leap year.
Enter a year: 2004 is a leap year.
Enter a year: 2023 is not a leap year.

errors: The program does not handle non-integer input. If the user enters non-numeric data, std::cin will enter a fail state, leading to uninitialized variable usage and potentially incorrect or undefined behavior without appropriate error checking and recovery (e.g., std::cin.fail(), std::cin.clear(), std::cin.ignore()).
